name: Starfighter Arduxim
short_description: Strap into the cockpit of your Arduxim fighter and take on enemy starships in this first-person tactical space shooter. Harks back to the classic Wing Commander games. Playable in VR or on monitor.
detailed_description:
Strap into the cockpit of your Arduxim fighter and take on enemy starships in this first-person tactical space shooter. Navigate through dangerous ice crystal fields, take hyper gates to other systems, take on enormous capital ships and more.

Includes:
  • A fourteen mission story based campaign covering your first tour of duty on the front lines
  • Multiplayer to test your skills against other pilots and AI bots
  • Survival/horde challenge mode with online leader board
  • Tutorial
  • Practice mode

Starfighter Arduxim requires motion controllers, a gamepad, joystick or HOTAS. Controls are fully customisable.
